coverage: 100% of reachable node types; Noise Texture uses Blender-compatible signed Perlin fBM and Merge by Distance removes coincident duplicate polygons.
validation: Authored vertex and face deltas are both 0.25%. Across six extrusion, thickness, resolution, smoothing, and flatten cases, maximum vertex delta is 0.35%, maximum local-bounds difference is 0.2723 units, and maximum depth-bound difference is 0.0012 units.
